title: ImageBuffer1 Property
description: Sets and returns the first source image buffer to be used for the SubtractAbs operation.
notes:
Specifies the image buffer number where the first source image data of the SubtractAbs operation is stored.

When ImageBuffer1 is set to "File", the image data will be acquired from the image file set in the ImageBuffer1File property and the sequence will be executed.

The SubtractAbs operation outputs the difference between two images of image butter specified by ImageBuffer1 property and ImageBuffer2 property.

For setting method of the image buffer, refer to ImageBuffer Property.
